title: Entra Connect Sync → Cloud Sync migration signal is live.
snippet: Microsoft has formally announced the transition away from Entra Connect Sync toward cloud-native Entra Cloud Sync. This isn't a hard cutoff yet, but the directional signal is clear — start your assessment now before it b

title: Entra Agent ID is GA.
snippet: AI agents in your enterprise now have a first-class identity framework built on OAuth 2.0, MCP, and A2A. If you're standing up any agentic workloads, this is the governance foundation you should be building on — not ad-h

title: Configurable Token Lifetime Policies are GA.
snippet: You can now formally shorten access, ID, and SAML token lifetimes per application via policy. This is a meaningful Zero Trust lever — particularly for high-value apps where stale token exposure is a real risk.

title: CBA on iOS fully unblocked and promoted in system-preferred MFA.
snippet: Certificate-based auth on iOS native apps previously had known issues that pushed it to last place in the system-preferred MFA list. Those issues are resolved — CBA now works as a second factor and can be prioritized. PI

title: SAP SuccessFactors provisioning must move off basic auth by November 2026.
snippet: SAP is deprecating basic auth for SuccessFactors APIs. Entra now supports workload identity-based auth as the replacement. If you run SuccessFactors inbound provisioning, this is an active deadline — start the migration

title: SAP SuccessFactors provisioning — migrate off basic auth
snippet: [Deadline: November 2026] — SAP is deprecating basic authentication for SuccessFactors APIs by November 2026. Entra now supports workload identity + short-lived tokens as the replacement. Begin migration planning immedia

title: Autopilot Intune Connector for Active Directory — old connector deprecated late June 2025
snippet: If you're still running the legacy Intune Connector for AD for hybrid join flows, the old connector reaches end of life in late June 2025. The new low-privileged connector is available now — migrate before the cutoff.

title: TeamViewer connector migration — 12-month window
snippet: If you use the old TeamViewer connector in Intune for remote assistance, you must migrate to the new connector within 12 months of this release to maintain functionality. Put it on your project board now before it become

title: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS — support ends August 2026
snippet: Intune now supports Ubuntu 26.04 LTS. Enrolled 22.04 devices stay enrolled but you should identify them (Devices → All Devices → filter Linux → add OS Version column) and notify users to upgrade before August.

title: Intune Data Warehouse Power BI beta connector v1 — retire your reports
snippet: The beta connector v1 for Power BI is retired. Reports created before November 2025 may still use it and need migration to connector v2 or the OData Feed connector. Audit your Power BI Intune reports now.

title: Purview DLP policy sync SLA reduction
snippet: [GA: June 2026] — Policy sync time drops from 2 hours to 30 minutes. No action required, but worth knowing for change management — your DLP policies will propagate significantly faster starting June.

title: Entra Agent ID Platform
snippet: [GA] — If you're deploying AI agents that access enterprise resources, Agent ID is the governance model you've been waiting for. It provides identity, OAuth 2.0-based authorization, and auditing for agents using standard

title: Configurable Token Lifetime Policies
snippet: [GA] — Admins can now formally customize access token, ID token, and SAML token lifetimes per application and service principal. Use this to shorten token lifetimes on high-sensitivity apps and reduce the blast radius of

title: Entra CBA on iOS — fully GA as second factor and in system-preferred MFA list
snippet: [GA] — Known iOS issues that previously forced CBA to last place in the system-preferred MFA list are resolved. CBA now works as a second factor in native iOS apps and can be ranked appropriately. If you operate a PIV/CA

title: Entra CBA Certificate Authority (CA) Scoping
snippet: [GA] — Admins can now restrict which CAs are valid for specific user groups, preventing certificate sprawl from allowing unintended auth paths. Scope CAs to their intended populations and audit your current CBA trust con

title: Entra CBA Issuer Hints
snippet: [GA] — Reduces user confusion on multi-certificate devices by surfacing only certificates the tenant trusts during the selection prompt. Low-friction security improvement — no policy change required, but verify behavior

title: Entra Connect Sync → Cloud Sync migration planned
snippet: [Plan for Change] — Microsoft is formally beginning the transition from Entra Connect Sync to cloud-native Entra Cloud Sync. No hard deprecation date announced yet, but the strategic direction is clear — document your cu

title: SCIM provisioning apps must move to modern authentication
snippet: [Plan for Change] — Older SCIM integrations using legacy auth patterns will be migrated to modern service-to-service auth over the coming months. Affected applications and customer deadlines will be published monthly via

title: SAP SuccessFactors provisioning — workload identity auth GA
snippet: [GA] — Entra provisioning to SuccessFactors can now authenticate via workload identity and short-lived tokens instead of static username/password. SAP deprecates basic auth by November 2026 — migrate now, this is not opt

title: Workday connector — termination lookahead GA
snippet: [GA] — Resolves termination processing delays for workers in APAC and ANZ regions. Admins can enable termination lookahead to prefetch data and customize deprovisioning logic. If you run Workday provisioning in these reg

title: Account Discovery for connected apps
snippet: [Preview] — Entra ID Governance can now generate discovery reports showing all accounts in connected applications — including orphan accounts not assigned in Entra. Useful for identifying SaaS sprawl and unmanaged accoun

title: Entra External ID federation with workforce tenants
snippet: [Preview] — Organizations can now let users authenticate to customer-facing External ID apps using their workforce Entra ID identity via standards-based federation. Reduces duplicate accounts for internal-to-external app

title: App-based branding themes in Entra
snippet: [Preview] — Beyond tenant-wide branding, you can now create per-application branding themes for distinct sign-in experiences. Useful for multibrand organizations or partner-facing applications requiring distinct visual i

title: PIM activation — Conditional Access reauthentication enforcement
snippet: [GA] — You can now require MFA or other CA controls on every PIM role activation, not just at sign-in. This closes a meaningful gap where users could activate privileged roles on a stale session — enforce this for all pr

title: License Usage page in Entra admin center
snippet: [GA] — Surfaces P1/P2/Suite license consumption alongside feature usage including Conditional Access and risk-based CA, with 6-month trends. Use this to rationalize license spend and identify underutilized premium featur

title: MIM 2016 Service Pack 3
snippet: [GA] — SP3 adds SQL Server, SharePoint, and Exchange compatibility updates plus Azure SQL Database with managed identity auth for the Sync Service. If you're still running MIM in a hybrid identity scenario, this reduces

title: macOS ADE + Platform SSO during enrollment
snippet: [GA] — Macs enrolled via ADE can now complete Platform SSO registration during the enrollment flow itself, giving users immediate access to Entra ID resources at desktop. Reduces the post-enrollment SSO setup friction th

title: Windows 365 Government — external identity support
snippet: [GA] — Government tenants can now provision Cloud PCs for external identity users, with connectivity via the Windows App on Windows. External identity support for macOS and Android clients is in preview.

title: Entitlement Management — approver visibility in My Access
snippet: [GA] — Requestors can now see the name and email of their approvers directly in My Access portal. Enabled by default for members (not guests), configurable per access package. Reduces help desk tickets asking "who do I c

title: Social Identity Providers in External ID Native Authentication
snippet: [GA] — Google, Facebook, and Apple sign-in options are now GA in External ID native authentication flows via browser-delegated (web-view) SDKs. Relevant for customer-facing app teams integrating social login.

title: Intune Enhanced App Inventory
snippet: [GA] — Faster and more detailed app visibility across managed Windows devices, with improved data freshness, richer metadata, and new controls to scope which devices are included in inventory collection. Use this to iden

title: EPM Support Approved Elevations from all device users
snippet: [GA] — Endpoint Privilege Management now allows any device user (not just the primary user or enrolling user) to submit support-approved elevation requests. Critical for shared device scenarios — review your EPM policies

title: Android credential provider management for Enterprise devices
snippet: [GA] — Admins can now control which apps act as system-level credential providers (password autofill, passkey storage) on Android Enterprise managed devices running Android 14+. Configure this under Apps → Android → Conf

title: Android XR device management
snippet: [GA] — Intune now supports Android XR devices via Android Enterprise dedicated and fully managed enrollment. Devices appear alongside standard Android in the admin center. For organizations piloting AR/VR hardware, this

title: Apple Declarative Device Management (DDM) for required iOS/iPadOS LOB apps
snippet: [GA] — Required LOB apps on iOS/iPadOS 18+ can now be deployed via Apple's DDM framework, improving delivery efficiency and providing real-time app status. Opt in by changing the management type to DDM in the app's App i

title: Direct Android LOB app management without Managed Google Play
snippet: [GA] — Upload APKs directly to Intune and deploy to COBO/COSU devices without going through Managed Google Play. Removes the dependency on the Play store approval pipeline for internal apps.

title: macOS Recovery OS password management
snippet: [GA] — Admins can configure and rotate a recovery OS password to prevent users from booting into recovery mode and reinstalling macOS. View recovery lock passwords in the per-setting status report — requires the "Remote

title: Autopatch Update Risk Visibility report
snippet: [GA] — The new report extends the security update status dashboard with per-device risk classification (Current, Exposed, Critical) and highlights which policies are contributing to risk. Prioritize your remediation queu

title: Microsoft Edge 139 Security Baseline
snippet: [GA] — Latest Edge security baseline is available in Intune. Evaluate against your current baseline and plan the upgrade — staying on outdated baselines leaves known-misconfiguration risk on the table.

title: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS support in Intune
snippet: [Preview] — Intune now supports Ubuntu 26.04 LTS for Linux device management. Ubuntu 22.04 support ends August 2026 — identify affected devices now and begin migration planning.

title: TeamViewer connector replacement in Intune
snippet: [GA] — A new, redesigned TeamViewer connector replaces the existing one with simpler onboarding and improved reliability. If you use TeamViewer for remote assistance, migrate within 12 months. Start now rather than scram

title: Windows 365 Autopilot Device Preparation (DPP) for Reserve
snippet: [Preview] — Autopilot Device Preparation is now available for Windows 365 Reserve provisioning in preview. Cloud PCs show "Preparing" status while apps and configurations install before the device is handed to the user.

title: Storm-2949 cloud breach anatomy
snippet: A real-world incident where stolen credentials alone enabled cloud-wide data exfiltration with zero malware. Read this. Then check your identity hygiene. This is the threat model you're defending against.

title: Purview Data Lifecycle: Retention-based archiving for OneDrive/SharePoint (July GA)
snippet: Inactive files auto-migrate to low-cost storage while staying compliant and discoverable. Copilot result relevance improves as a side effect. Start sizing your retention policies now.

title: Purview Lifecycle Management insights + policy recommendations (July GA)
snippet: Purview will surface sensitive data exposure across SharePoint/OneDrive and recommend retention policies. Free signal for hardening your compliance posture — no manual audit required.

title: Copilot in Word now supports Anthropic models (GA)
snippet: Users can choose Anthropic models alongside OpenAI when editing in Word. This is a meaningful shift in the Copilot model layer — worth understanding licensing and data handling implications before users start experimenti

title: Teams Rooms Pro: Enhanced issue detection + auto-remediation (GA)
snippet: Audio, video, and display issues now self-heal during nightly maintenance windows. If you're managing Teams Rooms at scale, this directly reduces your support queue.

title: Storm-2949: Compromised Identity to Cloud-Wide Breach
snippet: No malware. No novel exploits. Just stolen credentials and a patient attacker leveraging trusted systems to exfiltrate data at scale. Microsoft's detailed breakdown of Storm-2949's TTPs is required reading for anyone own

snippet: GA — July CY2026

title: How to Better Protect Your Growing Business in an AI-Powered World
snippet: Microsoft Security Blog post targeting SMB/mid-market, but the underlying framework — built-in security defaults, Zero Trust principles at scale — applies regardless of org size. Useful talking points if you're making th

snippet: GA — April CY2026

snippet: GA — July CY2026

snippet: GA — May CY2026

snippet: Preview — April CY2026 / GA — May CY2026

snippet: Preview — June CY2026 / GA — July CY2026

title: Entra Agent ID Platform — GA.

title: Entra Connect Sync → Cloud Sync migration announced.
snippet: Microsoft is formally beginning the transition away from on-premises Connect Sync to cloud-native Cloud Sync. No hard cutoff date yet, but the direction is unambiguous. Start your inventory of Connect Sync dependencies —

title: macOS Platform SSO during ADE — GA.
snippet: Users get Entra ID access the moment they hit the desktop on a freshly enrolled Mac, with no post-enrollment SSO setup required. If you're running ADE for macOS and haven't configured Platform SSO, this is now the baseli

title: macOS Platform SSO during Automated Device Enrollment
snippet: PSSO can now run during ADE registration, giving users immediate Entra ID resource access at first desktop. Requires pre-enrollment configuration. See: Configure PSSO during ADE for macOS.

title: Enhanced App Inventory for Windows
snippet: Improved data freshness, richer app metadata, and new controls to scope which devices contribute to inventory. Windows-first; additional platforms coming. Useful for identifying outdated or risky software at scale.

title: EPM Support-Approved Elevations for All Device Users
snippet: Endpoint Privilege Management now accepts support-approved elevation requests from any user of a device, not just the primary/enrolling user. Fixes a real gap for shared device scenarios.

title: Android Enterprise Credential Manager Control (Android 14+)
snippet: Admins can now explicitly configure which apps act as credential providers (password autofill, passkey storage) on managed Android Enterprise devices. Navigate to Apps > Android > Configuration > Managed Devices. Note: G

title: Userless ADE for visionOS and tvOS
snippet: Apple Vision Pro and Apple TV can now be enrolled through Apple Business Manager/School Manager without a user. Manage alongside other Android/Apple devices in the admin center.

title: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS support added; Ubuntu 22.04 end of support August 2026
snippet: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS is now supported. Ubuntu 22.04 support ends August 2026. Enrolled 22.04 devices stay enrolled but you need to notify users to upgrade. Filter by OS version in Devices > All Devices > Linux to find your e

title: Autopatch Update Risk Visibility Report
snippet: New report classifies devices as Current, Exposed, or Critical and surfaces which policies are contributing to risk. Extends the Security Update Status dashboard. Good for prioritizing remediation conversations with devi

title: Edge 139 Security Baseline available in Intune
snippet: Latest Edge browser security baseline is now available. Review and deploy alongside your existing Edge baseline profiles.

title: Windows 11 25H2 Security Baseline — GA
snippet: New Windows 11 25H2 security baseline is available. Existing profiles do NOT auto-update. Admins must create a new profile or explicitly update existing ones to adopt the new settings, defaults, and retired settings.

title: Direct Android LOB App Management (COBO/COSU)
snippet: Upload APK files directly to Intune and deploy to corporate-owned fully managed and dedicated devices without going through Managed Google Play. Streamlines workflows for apps that can't or shouldn't be published to the

title: Android XR Device Management
snippet: Android XR devices (including Android-based XR headsets) can now be enrolled via dedicated and fully managed modes. Deploy apps via Managed Google Play and apply compliance policies.

title: TeamViewer Connector Replacement
snippet: New TeamViewer integration replaces the existing connector. If you're on the old connector, you have 12 months to migrate before functionality breaks. Begin migration planning now.

title: Intune Data Warehouse beta connector v1 (Power BI) — Retired
snippet: Reports created before November 2025 may still use the beta v1 connector. You must transition to connector v2 or the OData Feed connector. Reports created after November 2025 already use v2.

title: Apple DDM for Required LOB Apps (iOS/iPadOS 18+)
snippet: Intune now supports Apple Declarative Device Management for required LOB apps on iOS/iPadOS 18 and later. Change management type to DDM in App information. Improves delivery efficiency and provides real-time app status.

title: macOS Recovery OS Password Policy
snippet: Admins can configure and rotate a recovery OS password to prevent users from booting company-owned Macs into recovery mode and bypassing MDM. Password visible in per-setting status report with appropriate RBAC permission

title: Remote Help Connectivity Improvement + New IME Log
snippet: New endpoint added for Launch Remote Help. Update firewall rules accordingly. New NotificationInfra.log added to IME logs for tracking real-time communication channel notifications.

title: Microsoft Entra Agent ID Platform
snippet: First-class identity framework for AI agents in enterprise environments. Supports OAuth 2.0, MCP, and A2A protocols. Developers can create and manage agent identities with enterprise-grade auth and governance. If you're

title: Entra Connect Sync → Cloud Sync Migration
snippet: Microsoft is formally transitioning away from on-premises Connect Sync to cloud-native Cloud Sync. No enforcement date announced yet, but posture is clear. Begin auditing Connect Sync deployments, custom rules, and write

title: SAP SuccessFactors Provisioning: Basic Auth → Workload Identity
snippet: Hard deadline: November 2026 (SAP deprecation date). Microsoft Entra provisioning will authenticate using workload identities and short-lived tokens instead of static credentials. If you have Entra → SuccessFactors inbou

title: SCIM Provisioning Apps: Modern Authentication Migration
snippet: Basic auth is being deprecated across SCIM provisioning integrations over the coming months. Timelines vary per application and will be communicated via monthly What's New articles and Message Center. Watch for your spec

title: CBA on iOS + CBA as Second Factor
snippet: Entra Certificate-Based Authentication is now GA on iOS. Eliminates unnecessary password/MFA prompts in native iOS apps. CBA can now be a second factor and system-preferred MFA method. Review your auth policies if you're

title: Entra CBA Certificate Authority (CA) Scoping
snippet: Tenant admins can now restrict specific CAs to defined user groups. Essential for environments with multiple PKI hierarchies — prevents over-broad certificate trust.

title: Entra CBA Issuer Hints
snippet: Users on multi-certificate devices will only be prompted to select certificates that are trusted and valid for the tenant. Reduces sign-in errors. No behavior change for certificates themselves.

title: Enforce CA Policies (including MFA) on Every PIM Activation
snippet: Reauthentication with Conditional Access is now GA for PIM role activations. Require MFA on every privileged role activation without workarounds. Implement this if you haven't already.

title: Configurable Token Lifetime Policies
snippet: Admins can now customize access token, ID token, and SAML token lifetimes per application/service principal via policy. Use this to tighten token windows for sensitive apps or accommodate legacy systems that need longer

title: GSA iOS Client
snippet: Global Secure Access client on iOS/iPadOS leverages existing MDE deployment — no additional agent required. Routes traffic through Microsoft SSE for M365, internet access, and private access.

title: GSA Network Content Filtering by File Type
snippet: Block or monitor file transfers to GenAI and SaaS apps based on file type at the network layer. Useful for preventing data exfiltration through file upload to unsanctioned AI services.

title: GSA Cloud Firewall for Remote Networks
snippet: 5-tuple (source IP, destination IP, protocol, source/destination port) based filtering for internet traffic from branch offices via GSA remote networks. Configurable from the admin center.

title: Workday Connector: Termination Lookahead for APAC/ANZ
snippet: Fixes termination processing delays for workers in APAC and ANZ regions. Admins can enable termination lookahead to prefetch data and tailor deprovisioning logic. If you have Workday provisioning and operate in those reg

title: Account Discovery for Connected Apps (Entra ID Governance)
snippet: Generates discovery reports from the provisioning experience to identify orphan accounts in connected applications that aren't assigned to the enterprise app in Entra. Good for access hygiene audits.

title: Entra External ID Federation with Workforce Identities
snippet: Users can now sign in to customer-facing (External ID) apps using their workforce Entra ID identity via standards-based federation. Reduces duplicate accounts for internal-facing consumer apps.

title: App-based Branding Themes
snippet: Assign different sign-in branding experiences to specific applications within a single tenant. Previously, branding was tenant-wide only.

title: MIM 2016 Service Pack 3
snippet: SP3 updates SQL Server, SharePoint, and Exchange compatibility, and adds Azure SQL Database with managed identity auth support for the Synchronization Service. If you're still running MIM, apply SP3.

title: License Usage Page in Entra Admin Center
snippet: Visibility into Entra ID P1, P2, and Suite license consumption. Shows feature usage (Conditional Access, risk-based CA) mapped to license type with 6-month trends. Useful for license right-sizing conversations.

title: Entitlement Management: Approver Visibility in My Access
snippet: Requestors can now see the name and email of their approvers directly in My Access portal. Enabled by default for all members (non-guests). Controllable at tenant and access package level.

title: Universal Print Badge API
snippet: Map employee badge credentials (card/NFC) to user identities for secure print job release. No app, PIN, or device sign-in required. GA target: July 2026.

title: Dirty Frag Linux LPE — Actively Exploited
snippet: Local privilege escalation in Linux kernel networking (esp4, esp6, rxrpc). Allows unprivileged → root escalation. In-the-wild exploitation observed. Microsoft Defender provides detection but patch your Linux kernels imme

title: Kazuar Nation-State Botnet Analysis (Secret Blizzard / Russia)
snippet: Microsoft published detailed analysis of Kazuar, attributed to Russian state actor Secret Blizzard. Kazuar has evolved from a traditional backdoor into a modular P2P botnet designed for persistent covert access. Read the

title: Third-Party Compromise / Supply Chain Intrusion Investigation
snippet: Microsoft Incident Response documented an attack that used legitimate administrative mechanisms to blend into routine operations. No loud exploits, no custom malware — just trusted tooling. Worth reviewing your third-par

title: AI App Misconfigurations → RCE and Data Leaks
snippet: Research post covering how exposed UIs, weak auth, and risky defaults in cloud-native AI apps on Kubernetes lead to RCE and data exfiltration. If you're running self-hosted AI workloads, audit your Kubernetes configurati

title: Purview DLP: Count of Labeled Documents Condition (Exchange Online)
snippet: New DLP condition: "Count of labeled documents is greater than [threshold]." Triggers when an email contains more than N attachments with a matching sensitivity label. Enables detection of bulk sensitive data exfiltratio

title: Purview Data Lifecycle Management Billing Change
snippet: DLM billing is moving to volume-based (per GB retained) for non-Microsoft 365 generative AI prompts and responses. Rate: $0.25/GB/month. If you have DLM policies covering AI data, model your cost exposure now.

title: Purview Endpoint DLP: Copilot+ PC Recall Snapshot Coverage
snippet: Endpoint DLP can now evaluate whether Recall snapshots on Copilot+ PCs contain content restricted by sensitivity labels or SITs, and block capture accordingly. Requires coordinated policy authoring between Purview and In

title: Purview DLP Additional Diagnostics (SPO, EXO, Auto-labeling)
snippet: New diagnostic tools for DLP SharePoint, DLP Exchange Online, and auto-labeling on SPO/OneDrive. Helps identify which SITs exist in a document, what labels are applied, and which policies triggered. GA targeted February

title: Teams Facilitator Agent for In-Person Meetings (Teams Rooms on Windows)
snippet: AI-powered notes, decisions, and action items for in-person meetings in Teams Rooms on Windows. Invite with one console tap. Notes appear on front-of-room display, available in meeting recap if shared, auto-deleted if no

title: Teams Quick Share for Images
snippet: Extends Quick Share to images via hover, right-click, and overflow menus. Copies links or shares images while preserving permissions. GA target: June 2026.

title: Teams Shared & Delegate Mailbox Scheduling for Events
snippet: Send event invites from shared or delegated mailboxes in Teams. Addresses Chiefs of Staff / EA workflows directly. GA target: June 2026.

title: Teams Searchable Keyboard Shortcuts
snippet: Search shortcuts by name or key combination in the shortcuts dialog. Low stakes, but reduces friction for power users and reduces support tickets. GA target: June 2026.

title: Copilot Page: Suggested Edits from Copilot
snippet: Select "Suggested edits" in the Copilot Shortcuts menu to get inline content improvement suggestions on your Copilot Page. Preview: May 2026; GA: June 2026.

title: Copilot Search: Match on People's Department
snippet: Copilot Search can find all people in a given department when querying the people source. Improves people-finder scenarios. Already GA as of February 2026 — confirm in your tenant.

title: Copilot People Connectors: ACL-based People Data Ingestion
snippet: Import people data from external systems with access control lists. Copilot respects source-system permissions for imported people data. GA target: August 2026.

title: Viva Engage Community Feed Improvements
snippet: Default community feed experience updated to align with expected user behaviors; adds

title: Hotpatch now default for all eligible Windows devices
category: Top 5 changes modern work engineers should care about
snippet: GA, May 2026 Windows security update. Opt-out available at tenant level or per quality update policy. Review your rings before it hits.

title: Entra hard-match restriction for role-holding accounts
category: Top 5 changes modern work engineers should care about
snippet: Action required before June 1. AD → cloud sync will be blocked for objects targeting Entra role-assigned accounts.

title: Agent 365: Shadow AI page + Intune endpoint controls for local agents
category: Top 5 changes modern work engineers should care about
snippet: Preview. First real governance surface for endpoint-level AI activity. OpenClaw covered now; Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI on the roadmap.

title: Conditional Access enforcement for policies with resource exclusions
category: Top 5 changes modern work engineers should care about
snippet: Action required before June 15. Apps that don't handle CA challenges will break for affected tenants.

title: Purview DSPM major evolution + IRM → Defender XDR integration
category: Top 5 changes modern work engineers should care about
snippet: Rolling. Biggest Purview release of 2026. Third-party signals, AI observability, Security Copilot agents.

title: Hotpatch enabled by default for all eligible devices
snippet: Starting with the May 2026 Windows security update, hotpatch is on by default for all devices managed via Windows Autopatch, Intune, or Graph API. No restart required — patches apply to running processes in memory. If yo

title: New Intune device view (preview)
snippet: Redesigned single-pane device view replaces the old tabbed layout. Overview → Tools and reports, Hardware → Details, Properties gets cleaner scope tag editing. All device actions, reports, and info from one surface — les

title: Linux SSO broker replaced with microsoft-identity-broker (C++)
snippet: The Java-based Linux SSO broker is retired. The new C++ microsoft-identity-broker enables full device join and device-bound authentication tokens, unlocking phishing-resistant MFA for Linux endpoints in Intune. Key chang

title: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS support added; 22.04 end of support August 2026
snippet: Intune now supports Ubuntu 26.04 LTS. Ubuntu 22.04 support ends August 2026 — currently enrolled devices stay enrolled but new enrollments will be blocked after EOS. Identify 22.04 devices now: Devices → All Devices, fil

title: Intune Data Warehouse beta connector retiring
snippet: The Power BI beta connector for the Intune Data Warehouse began its retirement transition April 20 over a two-week rollout window. Reports created before November 2025 may still use the beta connector and will return no

title: Android XR device management via Android Enterprise
snippet: Intune now supports dedicated and fully managed enrollment for Android XR devices, with OEMConfig available in the Intune store. Full availability expected mid-May 2026. Requires Intune Plan 2 license (included in M365 E

title: Entra Connect Sync → Cloud Sync migration (July 2026 notifications)
snippet: Microsoft is transitioning tenants from on-prem Entra Connect Sync to cloud-native Cloud Sync. Notification windows will be assigned via Microsoft 365 Message Center, Entra Connect Health, and email starting July 2026. D

title: Hard-match restriction for Entra role-holding accounts
snippet: Beginning June 1, Entra Connect Sync and Cloud Sync will be blocked from hard-matching a new AD user object to an existing cloud-managed Entra ID account that holds an Entra role. Ongoing sync for previously hard-matched

title: External MFA now generally available
snippet: External Multifactor Authentication (formerly External Authentication Methods) is now GA. Allows organizations to satisfy Entra MFA requirements using a third-party MFA provider while keeping Entra ID as the full policy

title: Global Secure Access: network-level file type filtering for GenAI/SaaS
snippet: Admins can define policies in Global Secure Access to block or restrict transfers of specific file types (documents, spreadsheets, PDFs) to generative AI and SaaS apps at the network layer. Adds DLP enforcement upstream

title: Prompt injection protection in AI Gateway
snippet: Real-time protection against malicious prompt injection attacks on enterprise GenAI apps and agents, available in AI Gateway (part of Global Secure Access). For Copilot Studio agents with the Global Secure Access client

title: Conditional Access enforcement for resource exclusion policies
snippet: CA policies targeting "All resources" with one or more resource exclusions will begin enforcing against previously-exempt scopes on June 15. Apps that don't handle CA challenges (MFA, device compliance) will fail for aff

title: Entra audit log improvement: only changed properties surfaced
snippet: Authentication Methods Policy audit log entries now show only modified properties rather than the full policy payload. Dramatically reduces log noise for SIEM ingestion and makes policy change tracking via Graph or Micro

title: Defender XDR: automatic attack disruption now isolates compromised devices
snippet: Attack disruption can now autonomously isolate devices identified as active attacker footholds — blocking lateral movement and attacker communication while keeping the device connected to security services. Time-limited,

title: Defender XDR: predictive shielding
snippet: Uses predictive analytics and real-time insights to infer risk, anticipate attacker progression, and proactively harden the environment before threats materialize. Works alongside attack disruption. Check the Activities

title: Identity Security dashboard in Defender XDR
snippet: New unified dashboard covering human and non-human identities across on-prem, SaaS, PAM, and IGA integrations. Includes a Coverage and Maturity page for gap analysis. Rolling out gradually — worth enabling in preview if

title: Secure Boot 2023 certificates — June 2026 deadline
snippet: Microsoft Secure Score now surfaces a recommendation to update devices to Secure Boot 2023 certificates ahead of the June 2026 expiration of old certs. The May 2026 cumulative update includes additional device targeting

title: Purview DSPM: unified posture management experience
snippet: The largest Purview release of 2026 delivers a rebuilt Data Security Posture Management experience: unified visibility across data estate, AI observability, posture reporting, Security Copilot agents, and third-party sig

title: Agent 365 becomes the unified agent control plane
snippet: The Entra admin center Agent Registry and Agent Collections blades were retired on May 1. Agent management moves entirely to Agent 365 in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. The existing registry Graph API will be deprecated

title: Shadow AI page: visibility into local AI agents on Windows devices
snippet: A new Shadow AI page in Agent 365 (powered by Microsoft Defender + Intune) surfaces local AI agent activity on Windows endpoints and lets admins apply Intune policies to block unsanctioned agent execution. Initial covera

title: Conditional Access extended to agents
snippet: Entra Conditional Access now enforces Zero Trust policies on AI agents. Delegated access agents (acting on behalf of a user) are GA. Own-access agents (operating with their own identity) are in public preview. Same polic

title: Agent 365 policy templates for onboarding governance
snippet: Reusable policy templates in Agent 365 bundle Entra, Purview, Defender, and SharePoint policies into agent onboarding guardrails. Apply consistent security controls at agent approval time rather than configuring per-agen

title: Copilot Calendar Agent + Outlook thread summarization
snippet: The Copilot Calendar Agent lets users set plain-English scheduling rules that Copilot executes in the background — fully reviewable and adjustable. Outlook Copilot now summarizes full email threads and drafts context-awa

title: SharePoint AI Charts web part + AI Citations Analytics
snippet: Page authors can generate interactive charts via plain-language prompts with the new AI Charts web part. AI Citations Analytics shows how often SharePoint content is referenced in Copilot responses org-wide — a direct si

title: Endpoint management
snippet: Intune for Windows, macOS, iOS/Android. Configuration policies, compliance, enrollment, Autopatch, and the Graph/PowerShell automation hooks underneath.

title: Identity & access
snippet: Entra ID, Conditional Access, External MFA, hybrid sync (Connect Sync → Cloud Sync), and the evolving agent identity model.

title: Defender for Endpoint & MDO
snippet: XDR updates, attack disruption, identity-based detections, and Defender for Office 365 changes that affect your mail flow and threat posture.

title: Purview
snippet: Sensitivity labels, DLP policy changes, Information Protection, Insider Risk, and AI data governance as Microsoft expands Purview's scope into the AI era.

title: Licensing
snippet: E3/E5 differences, Business Premium, Business Premium + Defender/Purview Suite Add-On, and Copilot licensing decisions — including the guardrails you should have in place before users go live.

title: Zero Trust
snippet: Not a framework slide. Practical changes to Conditional Access, device compliance, network access (Global Secure Access), and identity posture that move the needle.
